---
applyTo: ".codex/vendor/**"
---

# Vendored Code Instructions

- This subtree is externally managed vendored code, not the
  consumer-repository source of truth.
- Do not propose edits, review comments, or follow-up tasks for files
  under `.codex/vendor/**` unless the request explicitly asks for a
  vendor sync, upstream fix, or vendoring audit.
- If a pull request includes both consumer-repo changes and vendored
  updates, focus routine review on the consumer-repo files and treat the
  vendored files as out of scope by default.
